signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% (Up from 2.0%, Below 2.4% Forecast) | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]

This data, released around early April 2026, shows annual CPI rose to 2.2% YoY in March from 2.0% in Jan/Feb, missing market expectations of 2.4% and aligning near the Bank of Korea's 2% target amid contained pressures before Middle East volatility.[1] It follows 2025's full

signals.headline: CLARITY Act Senate Discussions Resume April 13 with Confirmed Markup Vote Expected Late April | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Senate Discussions Resume April 13 with Confirmed Markup Vote Expected Late April | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][2][3][6]

Senator Cynthia Lummis confirmed at the DC Blockchain Summit that U.S. crypto market structure legislation, including the CLARITY Act, is closer to approval after a stablecoin yield compromise cleared political hurdles, setting up an April markup post-Easter recess.

signals.headline: US and Iran Eye Fresh Talks Before April 7 Ceasefire Expires Next Week | YES | MED confidence**
